folio.label: 108v
folio.l: And streigút go to the deuel , whan I deye

note.notetxt: The emphatic A seems to have been corrected. Double check mS and insert tagging/ODR/

folio.l: Ne children shulde I noone , vp oon hire geten
ñet were me leuere , houndes had me eten
Than that myn heritage , shulde falle
In straunge hand , and this I telle ©ow alle
I doute nougút , I wot the cause why
Men shulde wedde , and forthermore wot I
There speketú many man , of mariage
That wot nomore of it , than wot my page
For whicú causes , man shulde take a wyf
If he ne may nat , lyue chast his lyf
Take hi~ a wyf , witú gret deuociou~
By cause of leueful , procreaciou~
Of children , to honour of god a boue
And nat oonly , for ¹amour or loue
And for they shuld , lecherie eschue
And ©elde here dettes , whan that it is due
Or for that eche of hem , shulde helpen other
In myschief , as a Suster shal the brother
And lyue in chastite , ful holily
But Sires be ©oure leue , that am nat I
For god be thanked , I dar make a vaunt
I fele myne lymes stark , and sufficeaunt
To do al that a man , bylongetú to
I wot my self best , what I may do
Thougú I be hore , I fare as dotú a tree
That blomytú , er æat fruyt I wexen be
A blosmy tree , nys neither drye ne dede
I fele me nowher hore , but oon myn hede
Myn herte and alle myne lymes , ben as grene
As laureÂ thurgú the ©ere , is for to sene
And syn that ©e , han herd al myn entent
I preye ©ow to my wyl , ©e wyln assent
Dyuäse men , diuersly hi~ told
Of mariage , manye ensaumples old
Some blamed it , some preised it certeyn
But at the laste , shortly for to seyn
As al day falletú , altercaciouö
Be twixe frendes , in disputaciou~
There fel a strif , be twix hise bretheren two
Of whicú , æat on , was cleped , Placebo
Iustinus sotúly , called was that other
Placebo seide , o Ianuare brother
Ful litel nede , had ©e my lord so deere
Counseil to aske , of ony that is heere
